description: Learn how to sauté vegetables and proteins quickly and effectively.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: vegetables, protein, and oil.
Cut all ingredients into uniform pieces for even cooking.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add oil.
Add the protein first and cook until browned, then remove from the pan.
Add vegetables to the pan and sauté for 3-5 minutes until tender.
Return the protein to the pan, mix well, and serve hot.
